protocol.name: wlr_output_management_unstable_v1

protocol.description: This protocol exposes interfaces to obtain and modify output device configuration.

interface.name: zwlr_output_manager_v1
interface.description: Output devices are represented as heads. Heads remain advertised while disabled and may expose one or more modes. The done event makes changes atomic and supplies the serial used to create a configuration.

interface.name: zwlr_output_head_v1
interface.description: A head is a connected output device and remains advertised while it is disabled. Its mutable properties are changed through a complete output configuration.

interface.name: zwlr_output_mode_v1
interface.description: A mode describes one size and refresh rate supported by a head.

interface.name: zwlr_output_configuration_v1
interface.description: Every advertised head must be enabled or disabled exactly once before the configuration is tested or applied.

interface.name: zwlr_output_configuration_head_v1
interface.description: Each mutable property may be set at most once.
